_comment: Reference RunPod Serverless endpoint settings for scale-to-zero neuromod inference (Deploy D0). Create the endpoint via the RunPod UI or GraphQL API; these are the values that satisfy 'pay only during inference'.
name: neuromod-gpt-oss-20b

_notes.workersMin: MUST be 0 for scale-to-zero: no idle GPU charge.
_notes.idleTimeout: Seconds a worker stays warm after a request before scaling down; trade cold-start vs cost.
_notes.flashboot: Enable to cut cold starts (weights paged VRAM<->RAM<->NVMe).
_notes.networkVolumeId: Bake HF weights here so cold starts don't re-download the model.
_notes.workersMax: Caps concurrent GPUs -> caps max spend (see Deploy D4).
